name: Atman
short_definition: The innermost Self, deeper than body and mind.
detailed_explanation: In Vedantic traditions, Atman refers to the deepest reality of the individual, not the ego-personality.

name: Dharma
short_definition: Right order, duty, and living in alignment with truth.
detailed_explanation: Dharma can mean cosmic order, ethical responsibility, and one's rightful way of living or acting.

name: Nonduality
short_definition: The insight that reality is not ultimately divided into separate independent selves and things.
detailed_explanation: In Advaita Vedanta, nonduality points to the identity of Atman and Brahman.
